eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Faribault, MN; at 5:39 PM on MAY 29, 2019 Effective until 6:09 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test. Test only from the Faribault County Sheriff's Office. This is a test. Test only from the Faribault County Sheriff's Office.
